title: We are looking for a specialist or agency to help us with our projects

posts.author: PeterTM (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are seeking seasoned agencies and skilled freelancers to join our team.

We’ve seen a significant increase in leads recently, and we’re looking for ways to manage our growing client base.

  • For Agencies:

We’re interested in forming collaborations based on a white-label model. This partnership will not only help us scale our onboarding capabilities but also extend your client base, creating a win-win scenario.

  • For Freelancers:

We are looking to engage with freelancers on a per-project basis initially, with the potential for further engagement based on performance and project needs.

Let’s connect to explore how we can achieve mutual success through this opportunity.

Looking forward to potentially partnering with you.

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Peter, I sent you a DM!

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PeterTM,

We’re able to assist and can connect to discuss whenever it suits you.
Please shoot an email through to teameasy@easy-mondays.com with your availability and a brief outline of your projects and services so we can connect you with the most appropriate person.

Excited to help you delve into the options and possibilities!

Have a great weekend
Emma
